iot.provisioningtemplate.provisioninghoo: Structure that contains payloadVersion and targetArn. Provisioning hooks can be used when fleet provisioning to validate device parameters before allowing the device to be provisioned.

iot.provisioningtemplate.provisioninghoo.Description: The payload that was sent to the target function. The valid payload is `"2020-04-01"`.
The ARN of the target function.
